treatments.Apple___Apple_scab: Apply sulfur or copper-based fungicides. Prune trees to improve air circulation.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Use rust-resistant hybrids and apply azoxystrobin fungicides if infection is severe.
treatments.Grape___Black_rot: Prune infected vines and apply myclobutanil during early growth stages.
treatments.Potato___Early_blight: Apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil. Ensure proper crop rotation and soil drainage.
treatments.Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Use copper-based bactericides. Avoid overhead watering to prevent spread.
treatments.Healthy: No treatment required. Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
